tasks.subject: P3 Task 1: Diff engine (lib/diff.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure diffMarkdown -> side-by-side DiffRow[] with intra-line word spans.

**Files:** lib/diff.ts, package.json (+diff,@types/diff), tests/unit/diff.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** identical->all unchanged with aligned line numbers; pure add/remove rows; changed row carries both texts + word spans.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/diff.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/diff.ts", "package.json", "tests/unit/diff.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/diff.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["identical all unchanged", "add/remove rows", "changed row word spans"]}
```

tasks.subject: P3 Task 2: Version read helpers (lib/versions.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** listVersions (metadata, newest-first) + getVersionMarkdown (snapshot|null); createVersion untouched.

**Files:** lib/versions.ts, tests/unit/versions.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** listVersions desc with createdBy.name; getVersionMarkdown returns string or null.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/versions.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/versions.ts", "tests/unit/versions.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/versions.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["listVersions newest-first metadata", "getVersionMarkdown hit/miss"]}
```

tasks.subject: P3 Task 3: Versions list API (participant-gated)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET /api/documents/[id]/versions mirroring document GET auth (ensureParticipant->404; 401 unauth).

**Files:** app/api/documents/[id]/versions/route.ts, tests/e2e/version-history.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** returns versions for participant; 401 unauth; 404 non-participant/absent.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:e2e tests/e2e/version-history.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/versions/route.ts", "tests/e2e/version-history.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:e2e tests/e2e/version-history.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["participant gets versions", "401 unauth", "404 non-participant"]}
```

tasks.subject: P3 Task 4: History route + diff component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Read-only /app/documents/[id]/history page: ensureParticipant gate, default latest-pair diff, ?from&to override, responsive split VersionHistory.

**Files:** app/app/documents/[id]/history/page.tsx, components/VersionHistory.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** participant gate 404; defaults latest two; single-version note; split lg+ / stacked below.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm build (route compiles)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/app/documents/[id]/history/page.tsx", "components/VersionHistory.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["participant gate 404", "defaults latest pair", "single-version note", "responsive split"]}
```

tasks.subject: P3 Task 5: History entry point + e2e flow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** History link in DocumentView + e2e covering list, default v2<->v3 diff, switch to v1<->v3.

**Files:** components/DocumentView.tsx, tests/e2e/version-history.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** History link navigates to /history; e2e asserts default pair + selector update.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:e2e tests/e2e/version-history.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/DocumentView.tsx", "tests/e2e/version-history.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:e2e tests/e2e/version-history.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["History link navigates", "default v2<->v3", "selector updates diff"]}
```
